---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for the menu
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**The use case**
What are you trying to do, and why? Describe the goal, not only the feature.

**Proposed feature**
What you would like the menu to do.

**SDK notes (optional)**
Any classes, functions, or offsets you think are involved.

**Reminder**
Single-player only. Requests that target multiplayer or other players will be
closed.
